name: E-5 inline suppression: leading // rubric-disable-next-line <rule-id> suppresses the violation on the next line
command: printf '// rubric-disable-next-line no-eval -- legacy\neval("x");\n' > in.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/inline-suppression.sh" --rule no-eval --in in.js 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && echo next_line_suppressed 1>&2
